---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact Information

**Kun Bu, Ph.D.**  

Incoming Assistant Professor of Data Science  
Seaver College, Pepperdine University  

Postdoctoral Scholar  
University of South Florida  

Email: [kunbu@usf.edu](mailto:kunbu@usf.edu)

## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7jhfNsIAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kun-bu-usfmathstat/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/KunPpBu)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-9526-3023)
